languages.text: "Ваши мета-ориентиры абстрактны. Гипотеза оценена как бессмысленная".
"Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."
languages.original_text: "Ваши мета-ориентиры абстрактны. Гипотеза оценена как бессмысленная".

traits.locale_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."
"Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

languages.text: “你的元基准点过于抽象。该假设被评估为无意义。”
languages.original_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

traits.locale_text: “你的元基准点过于抽象。该假设被评估为无意义。”

languages.text: « Vos métaréférences sont abstraites. Mon évaluation de cette hypothèse conclut qu'elle est absurde. »
languages.original_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

traits.locale_text: « Vos métaréférences sont abstraites. Mon évaluation de cette hypothèse conclut qu'elle est absurde. »

languages.text: "Meta referanslarınız soyut. Hipotez anlamsız olarak değerlendirildi."
languages.original_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

traits.locale_text: "Meta referanslarınız soyut. Hipotez anlamsız olarak değerlendirildi."

languages.text: «Sus metarreferencias son abstractas. La hipótesis se considera absurda».
languages.original_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

traits.locale_text: «Sus metarreferencias son abstractas. La hipótesis se considera absurda».

languages.text: "Eure Meta-Referenzen sind abstrakt. Die Hypothese wird als sinnbefreit eingestuft."
languages.original_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Meta-Referenzen sind abstrakt. Die Hypothese wird als sinnbefreit eingestuft."

languages.text: 「メタ参照は抽象的です。仮説は意味不明と評価されます。」
languages.original_text: "Your meta-references are abstract. The hypothesis is assessed as nonsensical."

traits.locale_text: 「メタ参照は抽象的です。仮説は意味不明と評価されます。」
